name: Muckamuck
description: Muckamuck sniper rifles are built for hard-hitting, accurate shots. They typically trade a slower rate of fire and heavier recoil for boosted damage and strong precision. Lower rarities can be bolt-action. Depending on parts, they use either a 7-round cylinder or a 7 to 8-round box magazine. They are broadly comparable to the Jakobs Chinook line.
notes: The Gearbox Muckamuck is only included with the Premiere Club pre-order bonus. The standard Muckamuck can drop from most appropriate loot sources.
